titulo: Soatok's Informal Guide to Threat Models
resumo: After a long day of exhausting conversations about Hybrid Post-Quantum Cryptography, random jackasses trying to play gotcha with endpoint attacks against end-to-end encrypted messaging apps, and me…

titulo: Cybersecurity in space: Protecting the next frontier of critical infrastructure
resumo: As missions move beyond Earth, organisations will need technologies capable of functioning independently under extreme conditions. Systems deployed in orbit may need to withstand radiation, communication delays and prolonged isolation while maintaining a stro…

titulo: New serious vulnerabilities spiked around release of Claude Mythos Preview
resumo: Notable organizations disclosed ~1,300 high- and critical-severity CVEs in June 2026, roughly 3.5× the pre-Mythos monthly record. Epoch AI's breakdown of vulnerability disclosures following Anthropic's Project Glasswing.

titulo: Pandhrabodi Lake Revival Bid On, Volunteers Remove 500kg Waste
resumo: Nagpur volunteers and NMC launch Mission Save Pandhrabodi Lake, removing 500kg waste in phase one to revive the encroached, shrinking urban lake.

titulo: NDRF deploys rescue teams in Maharashtra and Goa
resumo: NDRF pre-positions monsoon rescue teams at 12 locations across Maharashtra and Goa from July 1 to speed response to floods, landslides and urban flooding.

titulo: No respite for Junagadh as downpours batter Saurashtra for 3rd day
resumo: Saurashtra hit by heavy rain for 3rd day; Junagadh worst affected. Flooding strands bus and ONGC staff, floods homes, disrupts highways; NDRF on standby.

titulo: Gujarat police arrests four more accused in pan-India mule account scams
resumo: Gujarat CID Cyber arrests four in Operation Mule Hunt 2.0; mule accounts tied to ₹161-crore fraud and Bhavnagar bank hack, linked to 1,117 complaints nationwide.

titulo: Two-day urban mobility workshop held to push safe road designs in Ahmedabad
resumo: Ahmedabad hosted a two-day active mobility workshop with AMC and MoHUA, training officials and experts on safe walking, cycling and complete streets ahead of 2030/2036 events.

titulo: 28,234 students allotted junior colleges in second special CAP round
resumo: Pune FYJC 2026-27: 28,234 students allotted seats in second special CAP round; admissions must be confirmed online. Total allotments 77,466; Science leads.

titulo: Adani group to set up Rs 2,500cr health city in New Town
resumo: Adani Group to build a Rs 2,500 crore health city in New Town, Kolkata, on 51 acres, with Mayo Clinic collaboration; 1,000-bed hospital, half beds free.

titulo: Jaipur man arrested for murder over defecation bottle row
resumo: Jaipur Rural police arrest 28-year-old for killing missing villager Rakesh Jat over a bottle dispute; body buried in riverbed, recovered after month-long probe.

titulo: Build statewide trauma network, expand cancer care: Yogi
resumo: Yogi Adityanath directs UP to expand cancer care in every district and launch an integrated trauma and emergency network for Golden Hour treatment statewide.

titulo: Hazare defers July 5 fast after govt puts RTI Rules on hold
resumo: Anna Hazare postpones July 5 indefinite fast after Maharashtra govt puts 2026 RTI Rules on hold; warns of fresh stir if rules aren’t withdrawn.

titulo: Jagan murder: Vishnu arrested from high security jail
resumo: Civil Lines police arrested Vishnu Jat from Ajmer’s high-security jail for the alleged murder of dacoit Jagan Gurjar; medical board confirmed strangulation.

titulo: Hadapsar housing society blames road digging for power cuts, approaches police
resumo: Hadapsar’s La Salette society files police complaint over PMC contractor’s road digging damaging power cables, causing repeated 24+ hour outages and diesel costs.

titulo: Three held in 2021 JE civil paper leak cases, candidates allegedly paid Rs 15L each
resumo: Rajasthan SOG arrests three in 2021 JE Civil paper leak case; accused allegedly sold solved question paper to candidates for Rs 15 lakh each; probe ongoing.

titulo: Alibaba bans Claude Code after Anthropic is caught tracking Chinese users with hidden code
resumo: Alibaba has banned its employees from using Claude Code, Anthropic’s AI-powered coding agent, after security researchers discovered that the tool contained hidden code designed to identify Chinese users. The ban, effective 10 July, follows weeks of escalating…

titulo: Housing federation seeks EV charging, self-redevelopment norms in new cooperative by-laws
resumo: Maharashtra Housing Federation urges new cooperative bye-laws to include EV charging norms, self-redevelopment rules, pet guidelines, dispute resolution and digital governance.

titulo: Jaipur CMHO’s letter misstates Dhankhar’s blood group; rectifies on time
resumo: Jaipur health dept mistakenly listed ex-VP Jagdeep Dhankhar’s blood group as O- instead of A+ in SMS Hospital protocol letter; error corrected, no impact on angioplasty.
